rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that std::vector::push_back may reallocate the storage, invalidating iterators, and explains why this leads to a use-after-free error.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes capturing the value before the loop, which eliminates the dangling read and satisfies the local_fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests storing an index instead of an iterator and using a different container with stable iterators, both of which satisfy the global_fix criterion.
